vibe: Refined, sophisticated, warm, editorial, highly professional. Inspired by Claude (Anthropic) identity.

headings.style: Elegant, editorial, high-contrast, slightly tighter tracking.
headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1A1918]
headings.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#1A1918]

body.style: Clean, highly legible, warm geometric sans.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Sections should breathe. Elements shouldn't feel cramped.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D97757] text-white hover:bg-[#C55D3D] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1A1918] border border-[#E6E1D6] hover:border-[#D97757] hover:text-[#D97757] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: text-[#524F4A] hover:text-[#1A1918] hover:bg-[#F5F0E8] transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#E6E1D6] rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(26,25,24,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(26,25,24,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
cards.flat: bg-[#F5F0E8] rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 border border-transparent

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#FAF9F5]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E6E1D6] transition-all

inputs.default: w-full bg-white border border-[#E6E1D6] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#1A1918] placeholder:text-[#8A857D] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D97757]/20 focus:border-[#D97757] transition-all

badges.accent: bg-[#FDF4F1] text-[#A5472A] border border-[#FBE6DF] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide
badges.neutral: bg-[#F5F0E8] text-[#524F4A] border border-[#E6E1D6] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide

interactions.hover: Subtle upward lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow expansion for interactive cards.
interactions.focus: High contrast ring focus:ring-[#D97757] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#FAF9F5]

iconography.style: Stroke width 1.5, matching text color, minimalist.

testing.rule: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`, `data-testid="login-submit"`).

logo.description: SINKRONIZE Logo (Colorful on light salmon background). Must be used in header and footer.

hero.description: Four coworkers smiling around laptop at table. Use this for the hero section or social proof section of the landing page. Must apply a subtle gradient overlay or rounded clipping mask to fit the soft aesthetic.

features.description: Abstract 3D shapes on warm background. Use this to illustrate the 'Ecosystem' or 'Platform Tech' feature section without using a generic UI screenshot.
People collaborating on laptops. Use for the 'Affiliates' or 'Community' section.

dashboard_mockup.description: Clean dashboard graph on screen. Use as a visual representation for the 'Producer Dashboard Analytics' feature.

app_icon_placeholder.description: Elegant abstract line art icon. Use as a placeholder for App/Product thumbnails in the marketplace.

sections: Hero Section (Split layout: Strong Serif H1, App Marketplace Value Prop, Email Capture or Primary CTA 'Começar Agora', Image on right or overlapping abstract layout)
Value Proposition Bento Grid ('Para Produtores', 'Para Afiliados', 'Marketplace')
How it Works (Step by step with generous spacing and large elegant typography)
Final CTA (Warm coral background card with large text)
Footer (Darker beige bg, logo, links, legal)

marketplace.layout: Search Bar + Category Pills on top. Grid of App Cards below. Each card has App Icon, Name, Commission %, Price, Rating.
marketplace.filters: Sidebar or top dropdowns for Category, Commission Tier, Recency.

dashboards.layout: Sidebar (left, fixed, #FAF9F5 background, subtle right border), Main Content Area (right, #FFFFFF background).
dashboards.style: Highly functional, information dense but breathable. Avoid heavy shadows. Use flat borders. Tiers (Bronze/Silver/Gold) represented by distinct badge colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags (div, section, main, h1, p) heavily styled with Tailwind for the landing page to allow creative layout freedom.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions like Modals, Selects, and Tabs (especially inside the Dashboards and Checkout).
Customize Shadcn primitives to remove the standard Vercel 'black/white' tech look. Apply the SINKRONIZE warm color palette and softer borders.
Implement Google Login UI in the Auth screens.
Ensure the application supports a dual flow: Producers (creating/managing apps) and Affiliates (browsing apps, getting links, seeing commissions).
Make sure all components are written in .js/.jsx, NOT TypeScript (.tsx).
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all CTAs, navigation links, form inputs, and interactive widgets.
